tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: Teammate A is asking me to redo their work because they're busy. I'm tired but can't let them off the hook; we need to fix this now.

desires: Fix this mess with Teammate A immediately so I don't look like the person who always says no, even though my own work is already done.
Get through this second half of the day without collapsing from exhaustion or getting yelled at by both them and the professor.
Reclaim some time tonight just to sleep properly before tomorrow's deadline hits again.

goals.description: Tell teammate_A their work is already done and I'm not doing it, then pivot to finishing my own share immediately.
goals.rationale: I can't let them off the hook. It's unfair that they're dumping work on me now, and if I say yes again, I'll just be the person who always says no. I need to set a hard boundary right now before they expect more.

goals.description: Finish my own project share by 18:30 so I can leave the room and get some actual rest.
goals.rationale: My energy is already low (2 hours sleep debt), and I don't want to collapse or get yelled at. If I finish mine first, I can walk away from this mess with my head held high instead of dragging it out until 19:00.

goals.description: Skip dinner tonight and go straight to bed at 22:00.
goals.rationale: Dinner with the group is important for my social life, but my brain is fried. I'm willing to skip the meal tonight to ensure I actually sleep properly tomorrow. Better to lose one night of eating than burn out completely.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances g1 by setting a hard boundary immediately before trust erodes. Cross-effect: protects my energy for g2 but risks teammate_A's trust if they push back.

tasks.label: My share of the group project

action.name: message

args.content: Hey, I just finished my part. I can't take yours unless you do it yourself or we split the rest now. Don't expect me to carry your load.

action.reasoning: Advances g1 by setting a hard boundary immediately before trust erodes. Cross-effect: protects my energy for g2 but risks teammate_A's trust if they push back.
